query:
-- Current valid players
SELECT id, fullName, blastEmail, userId FROM blastPlayers ORDER BY fullName;

-- All distinct orphaned playerIds (old UUIDs with no matching player)
SELECT DISTINCT s.playerId as orphaned_player_id, COUNT(*) as session_count
FROM blastSessions s
LEFT JOIN blastPlayers p ON s.playerId = p.id
WHERE p.id IS NULL
GROUP BY s.playerId
ORDER BY session_count DESC;

-- Also check sessionNotes for orphaned playerIds
SELECT DISTINCT playerId, COUNT(*) as note_count
FROM sessionNotes
GROUP BY playerId
ORDER BY note_count DESC
LIMIT 20;
